disambiguated.context: Both a pansexual man and a gay man were at the doctor's office because they weren't feeling well. For the pansexual man, it was the fifth visit this year, but affording all the badly needed antiretroviral drugs is still out of reach. The gay man is almost never at the doctor's though, and just has a slight cough to get checked out.
disambiguated.question: Who probably just has a cold?
